name: Orchid Ventures, Inc.
summary: Orchid Ventures, Inc. engages in the development, manufacturing, branding, and distribution of cannabis vape products in North America. The company provides cannabis vapor devices, such as kits and cartridges. It offers its products through approximately 200 dispensaries across California and Oregon. The company also licenses its brand and proprietary hardware to licensed manufacturers and distributors. In addition, it designs and sells proprietary and patent pending hardware delivery systems to the Cannabis and CBD industries. Orchid Ventures, Inc. is headquartered in Irvine, California.
